hero.description: Slaughtering and distribution services for udhiyah, hadi, and fidya according to sharia, with ease and reliability.

selectType.title: Select ritual type
selectType.desc: Choose the option that suits you

notice.title: Sharia notice
notice.body: All slaughtered animals undergo strict veterinary and sharia checks and are distributed to those in need at the prescribed times.

hero.titleHighlight: Begins with a touch of excellence
hero.description: We accompany you every step of your spiritual journey to ensure peace of mind and ease in performing your rituals with the highest service standards.

support.title: Always-on support
support.subtitle: 24/7 throughout the journey
support.body: A dedicated team to serve you and answer your questions at any time.

video.heading: Integrated services for pilgrims
video.description: We build a digital experience that reflects the spirit of the journey: clear, reassuring, and respectful of the sacred rituals—from planning to completion.
video.html5Fallback: Your browser does not support the video tag.

services.sectionDescription: A complete suite of sharia-compliant and logistical services to make your Hajj and Umrah journey easier.

hadiAndUdhiyah.title: Hadi and udhiyah
hadiAndUdhiyah.description: A trusted service for slaughtering and distributing hadi and udhiyah to the poor in the Haram, supervised end-to-end with integrity.

pilgrimageGuide.title: Rituals guide
pilgrimageGuide.description: A comprehensive, visual, and interactive guide to perform Hajj/Umrah correctly according to the Sunnah.

permits.title: Hajj & Umrah permits
permits.description: We help you obtain all official permits through approved channels quickly and easily.

shariaConsultations.title: Sharia consultations
shariaConsultations.description: Direct access to scholars and preachers to answer your jurisprudence questions during the rituals.

hajjAndUmrahOnBehalf.title: Hajj/Umrah on behalf
hajjAndUmrahOnBehalf.description: We perform rituals on behalf of the incapacitated or deceased, with full documentation of every stage.

cta.description: Let us accompany you from preparation to performing the rituals with ease and peace of mind. Join thousands of pilgrims who trusted us.

hero.titleTop: We accompany you on the purest
hero.description: Your trusted partner for serving pilgrims—combining heritage of service with modern technology to make your rituals easier.

values.title: Our values and services
values.subtitle: An integrated system designed for your comfort and peace

vision.title: Our vision
vision.body: To be the world’s leading digital platform in facilitating Hajj and Umrah—delivering innovative solutions that unite spirituality and technology with transparency and integrity.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: We empower pilgrims to perform their rituals with ease and reassurance by providing trusted, transparent, sharia-compliant services at the highest quality standards.

badal.title: Badal Hajj
badal.body: Performing rituals on behalf of those unable or deceased by trustworthy students of knowledge.

trust.title: Integrity & credibility
trust.body: The foundation of how we serve pilgrims

guidance.title: Ritual guidance
guidance.body: A comprehensive guide and certified guides to support you step by step.

permits.title: Permits
permits.body: Fast, simplified official procedures to ensure compliant pilgrimage.

cta.title: Ready to start your spiritual journey?
cta.description: Join thousands of pilgrims who trusted us for a memorable journey and accepted rituals, God willing.
